item.title: kern_miri_zero: page paddr is absent as key in `init_masks`

error: the compiler unexpectedly panicked. This is a bug

note: we would appreciate a bug report: https://github.com/rust-lang/miri/issues/new

note: please make sure that you have updated to the latest nightly

note: please attach the file at `/home/zjp/KMiri/tests/init/target/osdk-miri/init-miri-base/rustc-ice-2026-06-17T09_36_04-163680.txt` to your bug report

note: rustc 1.96.0-nightly (55e86c996 2026-04-02) running on x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu

note: compiler flags: --crate-type bin -C embed-bitcode=no -C debuginfo=2 -C incremental=[REDACTED] -Z unstable-options -C link-arg=-Tmiri.ld -C relocation-m
odel=static -C relro-level=off -C force-unwind-tables=yes -C no-redzone=y -C target-feature=+ermsb

note: some of the compiler flags provided by cargo are hidden

end of query stack

comments.body:
The page address is not in init_masks:
```
frame.paddr=0x1208000

thread 'rustc' (176656) panicked at src/shims/foreign_items.rs:909:25:
paddr_page=0x1208000 init_masks.keys()=[
    "0x1000000",
    "0x1001000",
    ...,
    "0x11ff000",
    "0x1200000",
    "0x1201000",
    "0x1202000",
]
```

rename.to: kern_miri_zero: page paddr is absent as key in `init_masks`
